questions.enonce: When do you use the Simple Preterit?
options: For finished actions in a finished time (yesterday, in 2010...)

questions.enonce: We use 'for' and 'since' with the Simple Preterit only.
I {{1}} (watch) a great movie last night.

questions.question: Match the connector with the tense.

questions.enonce: Complete: I ... lunch at 1 PM today (it is now 5 PM).
